---
title: "Looking back on 2024 and forward to 2025"
date: 2025-01-03
categories: [news]
tags: []
description: "Completing my Civil Service job, new role at the University of Leeds and family updates"
---

In this post I look back on 2024 and forward to 2025.

## Work in 2024

I completed my two-year contract at [Active Travel England](https://www.activetravelengland.gov.uk/) where I was Director of Data and Analysis. I got a [promotion](https://robinlovelace.net/posts/2024-07-23-professorship/) to Professor, and from January 2025 am back to a single full-time job at the University of Leeds.

### Key achievements at Active Travel England:
- Set up a grant funding agreement between ATE and the Alan Turing Institute
- Instigated the ATIP project (plan.activetravelengland.gov.uk)
- The SchoolRoutes project for identifying school routes for active travel investment

## Academic highlights

- Two books with CRC Press (published in 2025):
  - Geocomputation with R (second edition)
  - Geocomputation with Python
- Keynote at Mobile Tartu conference
- CRUSE project published (cruse.bike)
- Biclar web application for Lisbon

## Open source contributions

- `od2net` R interface for route network generation
- `spanishoddata` R package for Spanish OD data
- `parenx` Python package for network simplification
- Contributions to `anime` package for linestring matching

## Community projects

- **Bike Fix Sunday**: Community bike repair project (150 members)
- **Chapeltown Cohousing**: Got a shared electric cargo bike
- **Oaty Cortado run club**: Weekly runs with mates

## Personal update

I became a father again! Baby girl Rosa was born on November 12th, 2024. Big brother Kit is being excellent.

Looking forward to 2025!
